news.title: Why Progressive Insurance Fell Today
news.summary: Second-quarter results were mixed, but signaled a softer, more competitive insurance market.

news.title: Progressive's Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates, Premiums Rise Y/Y
news.summary: Progressive's Q2 earnings beat estimates as premiums and securities rose, while policy growth stayed solid.

news.title: PGR Stock On Track For Biggest One-Day Drop In 6 Months After Q2 Earnings – Analyst Sees Limited Upside For The Shares
news.summary: For the second quarter, the company’s net premiums written rose 5% to $21.08 billion, while net premiums earned climbed 6% to $21.57 billion.

news.title: Progressive (NYSE:PGR) Reports Q2 CY2026 In Line With Expectations But Stock Drops
news.summary: Insurance company Progressive (NYSE:PGR) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q2 CY2026, with sales up 7.3% year on year to $23.61 billion. Its GAAP profit of $5.67 per share was 6.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

news.title: Progressive tops second-quarter earnings forecasts, but shares slide on margin concerns (PGR)
news.summary: Progressive Corp. (NYSE:PGR) reported stronger-than-expected second-quarter earnings, supported by continued premium growth and higher investment gains.

news.title: Progressive (PGR) Q2 Earnings Top Estimates
news.summary: Progressive (PGR) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +3.19% and -0.37%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

news.title: Progressive beats Q2 profit estimates; shares fall 4% premarket
news.summary: Investing.com -- Progressive Corp. reported better-than-expected second-quarter earnings on Wednesday, driven by continued premium growth and investment gains, though shares fell about 4% in premarket trading as investors reacted to a modest deterioration in underwriting margins.

news.title: Progressive (PGR) Reports Q2: Everything You Need To Know Ahead Of Earnings
news.summary: Insurance company Progressive (NYSE:PGR) will be reporting results this Wednesday before market open. Here’s what to look for.

news.title: Can Progressive Surpass Estimates This Earnings Season?
news.summary: Progressive enters Q2 earnings season with higher premiums and investment income poised to offset rising costs, and a projected year-over-year profit decline.
